_comment: Conversio demo: select the friendly Spearmen (uid 0, facing south at ~200,300), press V, and watch every soldier execute an in-place about-face (conversio) — each reverses 180° to face north while the file/rank grid stays put. Camera is zoomed in at the figure LOD so the silhouette flip is visible. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd.
